title: phebalium whitei
intro: Phebalium whitei, also known as White's phebalium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Phebalium whitei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Phebalium whitei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
